_publications._publicationTitle: PET Imaging of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with a Fluorine-18 Labeled Tryptophan Radiotracer.

_contextSnippet: L-[18F]FETrp showed a significantly higher tumor-to-brain ratio than FDG (2.0 ± 0.8 vs. 0.7 ± 0.3, p = 0.01)
details: Successfully calculated standardized uptake values (SUV) and tumor-to-brain ratios, with L-[18F]FETrp showing significantly higher tumor-to-brain ratio than FDG (2.0 ± 0.8 vs. 0.7 ± 0.3, p = 0.01)
